title: TARDIM Console (AIT)
description: Adds a TARDIM Console to Adventures in Time (AIT)
body:
# TARDIM Console

## Info
This Data/Resource pack is an Addon for Adventures in Time

It adds a custom console to the mod to play with.

## How to install
Reference these articles from the Minecraft Wiki

[Resource Pack Guide](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Tutorial:Loading_a_resource_pack)

[Data Pack Guide](https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Tutorials/Installing_a_data_pack)
